title: astragalus ochrobius var. longemucronulatus
intro: Astragalus ochrobius var. longemucronulatus, also known as the Long-spurred Milk-vetch, is a plant species in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include improved immune function, reduced stress, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus ochrobius var. longemucronulatus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs.
